title: Nuage Hayfever Wipes – Bold Claim Counting Hook (~20s)
script_text: Not eye drops, not tablets, not a nasal spray — just one pack that actually traps pollen before it gets to you. Thirty biodegradable wipes, peppermint and tea tree, wipe your face and hands and the allergens are gone. Fits in your bag, your car, your pocket. Check that price and those reviews — if you see the orange cart, grab it before it's gone.
